name: @bemedev/pipe-machine-monorepo
description: A strongly-typed pipe class library for function composition with advanced TypeScript support

scripts.pnpm:devPreinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json')); const version=require('child_process').execSync('pnpm -v').toString().trim(); pkg.packageManager='pnpm@' + version; fs.writeFileSync('./package.json', JSON.stringify(pkg, null, 2) + '\n');"
scripts.rinit: pnpm run rm && pnpm run config
scripts.ci: CI=$(date +%s) && pnpm run _ci && echo "\n✅ CI takes $(($(date +%s) - CI))s\n"
scripts.ci:admin: CI_ADMIN=$(date +%s) && pnpm run _ci && echo "\n✅ Admin CI takes $(($(date +%s) - CI_ADMIN))s\n"
